Sway_Type_Description: Creates a Proficiency Crisis.
Allows re-rolling any dice pool including Proficiency Dice, may keep either result.
Manipulates a Character's perceptions of a Character to increase or decrease their Impressions of the Player.
Immediately grants a new Proficiency suitable to the task being attempted.
Cancels a Die from being rolled in a Pool (usually a Proficiency Die).
Discards all cards of an attack.
Adds +10 Penetration Pips to an attack.
Add +1 Success Level or Failure Level to any Social Activity or Test.
Add +1 Success Level or Failure Level to any Psych Activity or Test.
Gain a hint from teh current Yarn-Teller or Ref, or Reveal or Remind a Revelation that has been previously missed.
Immediately summons 1d6 Distract Wounds on target.
Ignore current GRT, RT, and initiative order to take one Full-Action immediately.
Immediately grants 2 GRT to a target.

May be used to describe moments from a Character's past, allowing purchases to be made, or events to be changed etc. This is more than a mild Retcon, allowing a Character's history to be altered, but cannot Retcon major historical events alone.
Immediately exactly meet the difficulty of any Test or Stage of an ordeal.
Immediately add +1 Success Level, +1 Failure Level to the target's next action and 1 Unsoakable Distract to the target.
Target immediately loses, gains, fixes or replaces a Prop
Target immediately gains +2 Failure Levels (or a complete Failure).
Target immediately gains +2 Success Levels.
Target immediately pulls another card gaining the Pips as Chi.
Target immediately loses 8 Chi.
Move a card from your Hand to the Target's Hand and draw 2 cards.
Remove a random card from target's Hand and add it to your own. The Target may redraw.
The Target is intercepted or Ambushed immediately.
The Target may move to another Location immediately ignoring the Stage Difficulty, etc
The Target takes 1d4 Unsoakable Distract Wounds
The Target may remove all Distract Wounds instantly.
The Target immediately takes 4 Failure Levels and their current Score becomes -1.
The Target immediately gains 4 Success Levels and their current dice roll is maximised.
The Target must draw and take 1 Unsoakable Wound.
Remove the largest Wound from the Target.
The Target may ignore their Hitches or gain double Chi by activating a Hitch whilst affected by this Wyrd Tarot.
Closes or opens a slot where Wyrd Tarot cards can be played for the Target.
The Target may add +2 Success or Failure Levels to all social activities whilst atop pile, may also create or close a Style Reserve called "Charm" that can be used for social activities.
The Target may ignore Range Difficulties and add +1 Success Levels to all actions at Range or add +2 Failure Levels and +36 Range Difficulty to all actions.
The Target add +2 Success or Failure Levels to all creative activities, technology, creation etc.
Double or Half the Score generated by one Die as long as this Wyrd Tarot is played upon them.
+2 Success Levels while working alone, or +1 Success Level to all Characters working toward the "Plan" and creates a "Plan" Style Reserve.
The Target add +2 Success Levels to all Perception or Hiding Activities.
The Target add +2 Success or Failure Levels to all motion Activities while affected.
The Target add +2 Success or Failure Levels to all healing attempts and activities.
The Target add +2 Success or Failure Levels to all magic and creates or closes a "Magic" Reserve.
The Target add +2 Success or Failure Levels to all actions
The Target may ignore all Wound effects or Wound effects are doubled while affected.
The Target add +2 Success or Failure Levels to all activities to do with traps, and Ordeal cards may be played as "Obstacles" into the Stage, or taken into a "Trap" Style Reserve.

Adds +21 Pips to all attacks or defences by the Target, raises the Limit of any card to Mortal Wounds or lowers them to Crippling, and may raise or lower the Stakes by one, and affects what Hitches may be created by Wounds.
